languages.text: {n}Лица обоих офицеров вытягиваются. Юноша пытается выйти вперед и загородить собой отца, но старший офицер торопливо произносит:{/n} "Мы молим о прощении за свою дерзоть, Лорд-капитан, и примем наказание со смирением!"

{n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"
languages.original_text: {n}Лица обоих офицеров вытягиваются. Юноша пытается выйти вперед и загородить собой отца, но старший офицер торопливо произносит:{/n} "Мы молим о прощении за свою дерзоть, Лорд-капитан, и примем наказание со смирением!"

traits.locale_text: {n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"

{n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"

{n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"

languages.text: {n}両方の警官の顔は緊張した。若い男は父親を庇うように前に出るが、年配の警官が慌てて言った。{/n}「失礼を詫びます、艦長様。罰を受けます」
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"

languages.text: {n}Her iki subayın da yüzü geriliyor. Genç adam öne çıkıp babasını engellemeye çalışsa da yaşlı subay aceleyle konuşuyor.{/n} "Küstahlığımız için affınızı diliyoruz Lord Kaptan. Cezamızı tevazu ile kabul edeceğiz!"
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Her iki subayın da yüzü geriliyor. Genç adam öne çıkıp babasını engellemeye çalışsa da yaşlı subay aceleyle konuşuyor.{/n} "Küstahlığımız için affınızı diliyoruz Lord Kaptan. Cezamızı tevazu ile kabul edeceğiz!"

languages.text: {n}两名军官的脸色骤然紧绷。年轻人试图上前挡住父亲，但年长军官急忙开口：{/n}“我们为自身的无礼乞求宽恕，舰长大人，愿恭领责罚！”
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"

traits.locale_text: {n}两名军官的脸色骤然紧绷。年轻人试图上前挡住父亲，但年长军官急忙开口：{/n}“我们为自身的无礼乞求宽恕，舰长大人，愿恭领责罚！”

languages.text: {n}Die Gesichter der beiden Offiziere erstarren. Der junge Mann will vortreten, um seinen Vater so stoppen, aber der ältere Offizier ergreift eilig das Wort:{/n} "Wir bitten unsere Anmaßung zu entschuldigen, Lord Captain, und werden jegliche Bestrafung demütig ertragen!"
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Gesichter der beiden Offiziere erstarren. Der junge Mann will vortreten, um seinen Vater so stoppen, aber der ältere Offizier ergreift eilig das Wort:{/n} "Wir bitten unsere Anmaßung zu entschuldigen, Lord Captain, und werden jegliche Bestrafung demütig ertragen!"

languages.text: {n}Les traits des deux officiers se tendent. Le plus jeune fait mine d'avancer pour s'interposer entre son père et vous, mais le vieil homme se hâte de l'interrompre :{/n} « Nous implorons votre pardon pour notre insolence, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, et nous acceptons humblement notre juste châtiment ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Les traits des deux officiers se tendent. Le plus jeune fait mine d'avancer pour s'interposer entre son père et vous, mais le vieil homme se hâte de l'interrompre :{/n} « Nous implorons votre pardon pour notre insolence, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, et nous acceptons humblement notre juste châtiment ! »

languages.text: {n}Ambos oficiales se tensan. El joven intenta dar un paso al frente y tapar a su padre, pero el anciano habla rápidamente:{/n} «Le rogamos que disculpe la insolencia, Lord Capitán. ¡Aceptaremos humildemente nuestro castigo!».
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"
